title: SpawnEggDrops
description: Plugin | Mobs can drop their spawn eggs on death.
body:
![Bisect Hosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9bab445b70d606b96245d2dcb0fe9756d1f09c69.webp)
### [Use our code " withrage " to get 25% discount!](https://bisecthosting.com/withrage)
# SPAWN EGG DROPS
**All mobs** have by default a **10%** chance to drop their spawn egg when killed. This can be changed through a **configuration file**!

This plugin is also available on **[Spigot](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/spawneggdrops.120732/)** and **[CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/bukkit-plugins/spawneggdrops)**!

![zombie droping spawn egg example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf24fc79e78446caf7ced7506489cf053ff4a9c0_0.webp)
![sheep droping spawn egg example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb2b01da9d3d4951e4eb78b703bfdf30e91d41c6_0.webp)
![warden droping spawn egg example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e51fde455ded6a5928bf4f1c630076c47bdf739_0.webp)
